heading: Oceanographic research vessels
label: 50503 Oceanographic research vessels
text: An oceanographic research vessel (as defined in ) is deemed not to be engaged in trade or commerce.section 2101 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5050346 App.:441., §§ 1, 3, 4, , .Pub. L. 89–9979 Stat. 424July 30, 196546 App.:443.46 App.:444.The definitions of “oceanographic research vessel” and “scientific personnel” in 46 App. U.S.C. 441 are omitted because substantially the same definitions are already in .46 U.S.C. 2101The text of 46 App. U.S.C. 444 is omitted because , which defines “seaman” for purposes of part G of subtitle II of title 46, already contains an exception for scientific personnel. Title 53 of the Revised Statutes, referred to [in] 46 App. U.S.C. 444, was previously codified principally in part G of subtitle II of title 46.section 10101(3) of title 46
